title: Simple Guilds
description: Create and join guilds with a chat system
body:
# SimpleGuilds

A lightweight and easy-to-use guild system for your Minecraft server!
Players can create and manage their own guilds, invite others, and chat privately with their guild members.

## Features

Create and disband guilds

Invite and manage members

Join other guilds

Private guild chat

### Commands

| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/guild create <name>` | Create a new guild |
| `/guild disband` | Disband your guild (owner only) |
| `/guild list` | Show all members of your guild |
| `/guild join <name>` | Request to join an existing guild |
| `/guild invite <player>` | Invite a player to your guild (owner only) |
| `/guild kick <player>` | Kick a member from your guild (owner only) |
| `/guild leave` | Leave your current guild |
| `/guild help` | Display the help message |
| `/guild motd edit <message>` | Edit the MOTD (\n for new line) |
| `/guild motd apply` | Apply the MOTD to your guild |
| `/gc <message>` | Send a message in guild chat |
